created.descriptionHtml: A new organization custom property was created.
created.summaryHtml: This event occurs when there is activity relating to an organization custom property.

childParamsGroups.name: url
childParamsGroups.description: The URL that can be used to fetch, update, or delete info about this property via the API.

childParamsGroups.name: value_type
childParamsGroups.description: The type of the value for the property

childParamsGroups.name: allowed_values
childParamsGroups.description: An ordered list of the allowed values of the property. The property can have up to 200 allowed values.

childParamsGroups.name: values_editable_by
childParamsGroups.description: Who can edit the values of the property

bodyParameters.name: enterprise
bodyParameters.description: An enterprise on GitHub. Webhook payloads contain the enterprise property when the webhook is configured on an enterprise account or an organization that's part of an enterprise account. For more information, see "About enterprise accounts."

deleted.summaryHtml: This event occurs when there is activity relating to an organization custom property.

childParamsGroups.name: property_name
childParamsGroups.description: The name of the property that was deleted.

bodyParameters.name: enterprise
bodyParameters.description: An enterprise on GitHub. Webhook payloads contain the enterprise property when the webhook is configured on an enterprise account or an organization that's part of an enterprise account. For more information, see "About enterprise accounts."

bodyParameters.name: installation
bodyParameters.description: The GitHub App installation. Webhook payloads contain the installation property when the event is configured for and sent to a GitHub App. For more information, see "Using webhooks with GitHub Apps."
